title: The American gazetteer [microform] : exhibiting in alphabetical order a much more full and accurate account than has been given of the states, provinces, counties, cities, towns, villages, rivers, bays, harbours, gulfs, sounds, capes, mountains, forts, Indian tribes & new discoveries on the American continent, also of the West India islands and other islands appendant to the continent, and those newly discovered in the Pacific Ocean: describing the extent, boundaries, population, government, productions, commerce ... with a particular description of the Georgia Western Territory: the whole comprising upwards of seven thousand distinct articles
